entry.title: Entry #30 in Ganan v. LinkedIn Corporation, 5:26-cv-02968
entry.summary: Request for Judicial Notice re [29] MOTION to Dismiss Plaintiffs Nicholas Farrell and Jeff Ganan's Complaints filed byLinkedIn Corporation. (Attachments: # (1) Declaration of Natalie Peelish in Support of Defendant LinkedIn's Request for Incorporation by Reference and/or Judicial Notice, # (2) Exhibit 1 - BrowserGate Website, # (3) Exhibit 2 - LinkedIn User Agreement, # (4) Exhibit 3 - LinkedIn Privacy Policy, # (5) Exhibit 4 - LinkedIn Cookie Policy, # (6) Exhibit 5 - Teamfluence Webpage, # (7) Exhibit 6 - Fairlinked Webpage, # (8) Exhibit 7 - PordaAI, Chrome Web Store, # (9) Exhibit 8 - Anti-woke, Chrome Web Store, # (10) Exhibit 9 - Certified Translation of Prelim. March 11, 2026 Judgment of the Regional Court of Munich I (37 O 104/26))(Related document(s)[29]) (Santacana, Eduardo) (Filed on 6/30/2026)

entry.title: Entry #29 in Ganan v. LinkedIn Corporation, 5:26-cv-02968
entry.summary: MOTION to Dismiss Plaintiffs Nicholas Farrell and Jeff Ganan's Complaints filed by LinkedIn Corporation. Motion to Dismiss Hearing set for 9/3/2026 10:00 AM in San Francisco, Courtroom 03, 17th Floor. Responses due by 7/14/2026. Replies due by 7/21/2026. (Attachments: # (1) Declaration of Tyler Seymour ISO Defendant LinkedIn Corporation's Motion to Dismiss For Lack of Subject Matter Jurisdiction, # (2) Exhibit A - Human-LinkedIn Data Processing Agreement)(Santacana, Eduardo) (Filed on 6/30/2026)

entry.summary: Order

entry.title: Entry #23 in Ganan v. LinkedIn Corporation, 5:26-cv-02968
entry.summary: ORDER. In light of the upcoming motion to consolidate hearing, the case management conference scheduled for June 5 is vacated. The parties should be prepared to discuss scheduling at the hearing on the motion to consolidate. Signed by Judge Vince Chhabria on 5/29/26. (This is a text-only entry generated by the court. There is no document associated with this entry.) (vclc2, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 5/29/2026)

entry.summary: Certificate of Interested Entities by Jeff Ganan (Howell, J.R.) (Filed on 5/21/2026)

entry.title: Entry #20 in Ganan v. LinkedIn Corporation, 5:26-cv-02968
entry.summary: REASSIGNED CASE - NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE: You are notified that the Court has scheduled an Initial Case Management Conference before Judge Vince Chhabria upon reassignment. For a copy of Judge Chhabria's Standing Order and other information, please refer to the Court's website at www.cand.uscourts.gov. Joint Case Management Statement due by 5/29/2026. Initial Case Management Conference set for 6/5/2026 at 10:00 AM by Videoconference Only. This proceeding will be held via a Zoom webinar.Webinar Access: All counsel, members of the public, and media may access the webinar information at https://www.cand.uscourts.gov/vc Court Appearances: Advanced notice is required of counsel or parties who wish to be identified by the court as making an appearance or will be participating in the argument at the hearing. One list of names of all counsel appearing for all parties must be sent in one email to the CRD at vccrd@cand.uscourts.gov no later than Friday, May 29, 2026, by no later than 12:00PM.Civ LR 77-3(d). Persons granted access to court proceedings held by telephone or videoconference are reminded that photographing, recording, and rebroadcasting of court proceedings, including screenshots or other visual copying of a hearing, is absolutely prohibited.Zoom Guidance and Setup: https://cand.uscourts.gov/zoom. (This is a text-only entry generated by the court. There is no document associated with this entry.)(bxs, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 5/19/2026)

entry.title: Entry #19 in Ganan v. LinkedIn Corporation, 5:26-cv-02968
entry.summary: ORDER REASSIGNING CASE IT IS ORDERED that this case is directly assigned to Judge Vince Chhabria. Judge Eumi K. Lee no longer assigned to the case. Counsel are instructed that all future filings shall bear the updated judicial initials immediately after the case number. Counsel are reminded to verify the location of the judge on the court website. All hearing and trial dates presently scheduled are vacated. However, existing briefing schedules for motions remain unchanged. Motions must be renoticed for hearing before the judge to whom the case has been reassigned, but the renoticing of the hearing does not affect the prior briefing schedule. Other deadlines such as those for ADR compliance and discovery cutoff also remain unchanged. Notice: The assigned judge participates in the Cameras in the Courtroom Pilot Project. See General Order 65 and cand.uscourts.gov/cameras. Mark B. Busby Clerk, United States District Court (This is a text-only entry generated by the court. There is no document associated with this entry.) (mxg, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 5/19/2026)

entry.title: Entry #14 in Ganan v. LinkedIn Corporation, 5:26-cv-02968
entry.summary: CLERK'S NOTICE RESETTING CASE MANAGEMENT DEADLINES FOLLOWING REASSIGNMENT. Case Management Statement due by 7/22/2026. Initial Case Management Conference set for 8/5/2026 at 01:30 PM before Judge Eumi K. Lee. This proceeding will be held via a Zoom meeting.Court Appearances: Advanced notice is required of counsel or parties who will be present at the hearing. A list of names and emails must be sent to the CRD at eklcrd@cand.uscourts.gov no later than 8/3/2026 at 5:00PM PDT.Civ LR 77-3(d). Persons granted access to court proceedings held by telephone or videoconference are reminded that photographing, recording, and rebroadcasting of court proceedings, including screenshots or other visual copying of a hearing, is absolutely prohibited. (This is a text-only entry generated by the court. There is no document associated with this entry.) (lrt, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 4/23/2026)

entry.title: Entry #13 in Ganan v. LinkedIn Corporation, 5:26-cv-02968
entry.summary: STIPULATION Joint Stipulation Extending Time for Defendant to Answer or Respond to Complaint filed by LinkedIn Corporation. (Santacana, Eduardo) (Filed on 4/23/2026)

entry.title: Entry #12 in Ganan v. LinkedIn Corporation, 5:26-cv-02968
entry.summary: ORDER REASSIGNING CASE IT IS ORDERED that this case is reassigned using a proportionate, random and blind system pursuant to General Order No. 44 to Judge Eumi K. Lee. Magistrate Judge Virginia K. DeMarchi no longer assigned to the case. Counsel are instructed that all future filings shall bear the updated judicial initials immediately after the case number. Counsel are reminded to verify the location of the judge on the court website. All hearing and trial dates presently scheduled are vacated. However, existing briefing schedules for motions remain unchanged. Motions must be renoticed for hearing before the judge to whom the case has been reassigned, but the renoticing of the hearing does not affect the prior briefing schedule. Other deadlines such as those for ADR compliance and discovery cutoff also remain unchanged. Mark B. Busby Clerk, United States District Court (This is a text-only entry generated by the court. There is no document associated with this entry.) (mxg, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 4/23/2026)

entry.summary: Case Assigned/Reassigned
